title: Who sang this
wikitext:
[]: Who sang this?             Quote Post by Man Chong » Sat Sep 11, 2004 10:46 pm http://www.jamesanime.ch/sound/evangelion/ash-rei-ver-of-zankoku.mp3 Well, me and my friend were discussing about who actually sang this... The title says "Rei," but I'm pretty sure that it's Misato...I dunno... Whatcha guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Vodrake » Sun Sep 12, 2004 2:06 am Megumi Hayashibara, Rei's Seiyuu.

[]:             Quote Post by Man Chong » Sun Sep 12, 2004 1:12 pm Wait, are you serious? o.O That's megum? Sounds so much like...Misato...

[]: ?!             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Sep 14, 2004 4:19 pm what song i cant download it my comp sucks not really but im on school comp right now in class so i dont want to cause a panic or anthing is it safe to hear you no profanity or moaning sex sounds or anything.
